styles.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-slate-900
styles.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900

layout.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 lg:gap-12

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 text-white font-medium rounded-md px-6 py-2 hover:bg-blue-700 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:ring-offset-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-100 text-slate-900 font-medium rounded-md px-6 py-2 hover:bg-slate-200 border border-slate-200 transition-colors
buttons.destructive: bg-rose-500 text-white font-medium rounded-md px-6 py-2 hover:bg-rose-600 transition-colors

inputs.base: w-full border border-slate-300 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-slate-900 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent placeholder-slate-400 bg-white

badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200
navigation.sidebar: fixed left-0 w-64 h-full bg-slate-900 text-white border-r border-slate-800

hero_background.description: Workers moving pallets in a large warehouse
hero_background.usage: Landing page hero section with a dark overlay (bg-slate-900/60) to allow text visibility

delivery_integration.usage: Feature section showcasing delivery company integrations

team_collaboration.description: Colleagues discussing work at their desks
team_collaboration.usage: Multi-user team feature section on landing page

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing pages (landing, about) to ensure high visual impact. Avoid standard Shadcn components for structural marketing layouts, but use them for interactive elements (forms, modals).
For the Dashboard, strictly use Shadcn components heavily customized to match the Swiss & High-Contrast archetype. Keep border-radius to a maximum of 8px.
Data grids and tables MUST support horizontal scrolling and use dense spacing (p-3 or p-4 inside cells). Ensure proper contrast for status badges.
Implement 'data-testid' attributes on ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) to facilitate automated testing.
Use pure React and Tailwind for animations, utilizing transition-all duration-200 ease-out on buttons and cards.
Never use full-screen color gradients. Stick to solid white or slate-50 backgrounds for the app, creating structure with 1px borders.
The hero image on the landing page MUST use an overlay like bg-slate-900/60 to ensure text readability.
For the 58 Wilayas selection, use a searchable combobox from Shadcn (Command + Popover) instead of a native select dropdown.

For delivery companies (Yalidine, ZR Express, Maystro, EcoTrack) and order sources (WhatsApp, Facebook, Google Sheets), use standard SVG icons or simple logos if actual ones are unavailable; do NOT use generic placeholder image URLs.
